mapper.sql: SELECT T.PARAM_NO, T.ITEM_NO, PI.ITEM_ID, SY.CONTENT AS ALIAS_NAME, T.CALCU_ORDER, T.PRICISION, T.CARRY_BIT, T.CPNY_ID, SY0.CONTENT AS CPNY_NAME, T.APPLY_TYPE, SY1.CONTENT AS APPLY_TYPE_NAME, PI.SHOW_YN, PI.SHOW_ORDER, GET_ITEM_GLAG(PI.ITEM_ID, T.CPNY_ID) AS ITEM_FLAG, GET_ITEM_NUMBER(PI.ITEM_ID, T.CPNY_ID) AS ITEM_NUMBER FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM T, PA_ITEM PI, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY, HR_COMPANY HR, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY0, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY1 WHERE T.ITEM_NO = PI.ITEM_NO AND T.ITEM_NO = SY.NO(+) AND SY.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.CPNY_ID = HR.CPNY_ID AND HR.CPNY_NO = SY0.NO(+) AND SY0.LANGUAGE = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.APPLY_TYPE = SY1.NO(+) AND SY1.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PI.ACTIVITY = 1 AND T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

sql.if: AND (PI.ITEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{aliasNameSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR SY.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{aliasNameSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT T.PARAM_NO, T.ITEM_NO, PI.ITEM_ID, SY.CONTENT AS ALIAS_NAME, T.CALCU_ORDER, T.PRICISION, T.CARRY_BIT, T.CPNY_ID, T.APPLY_TYPE, SY1.CONTENT AS APPLY_TYPE_NAME FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM T, PA_ITEM PI, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY1 WHERE T.ITEM_NO = PI.ITEM_NO AND T.ITEM_NO = SY.NO(+) AND SY.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.APPLY_TYPE = SY1.NO(+) AND SY1.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SYS_GUID() FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PA_ITEM_PARAM ( PARAM_NO, ITEM_NO, CPNY_ID, PRICISION, CARRY_BIT, APPLY_TYPE, CALCU_ORDER, CREATED_BY, CREATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pricision, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{carryBit, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(P.CALCU_ORDER), 0) + 1 FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM P WHERE P.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_ITEM_PARAM SET PRICISION = #{pricision, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CARRY_BIT = #{carryBit, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, APPLY_TYPE = #{applyType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT T.ITEM_NO, SY.CONTENT AS ITEM_NAME, T.DESCR, T.DATATYPE, T.ITEM_ID FROM PA_ITEM T, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY WHERE T.ITEM_NO = SY.NO(+) AND SY.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.ACTIVITY IN (1, 11) AND T.ITEM_NO NOT IN (SELECT P.ITEM_NO FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM P WHERE P.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND P.ITEM_NO IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY T.ITEM_NO

SELECT DISTINCT T.APPLY_TYPE, SY.CONTENT AS APPLY_TYPE_NAME FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM T, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY WHERE T.APPLY_TYPE = SY.NO(+) AND SY.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.APPLY_TYPE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T.APPLY_TYPE
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_ITEM_PARAM SET CALCU_ORDER = #{calcuOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
